<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band14_chunk004.pdf#page=21 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band14 p190 -->

<!-- header: GEISENFELD -->

<!-- header: GEISENFELI -->


[[File:Band14_chunk004_p021_img001.jpg|thumb|Der Kirchenraus]]



[[File:Band14_chunk004_p021_img002.jpg|thumb]]
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band14 p191 -->
